'''mashava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scabiosa|scabiosa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scabiosa|scabiosa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mashava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæshævæth|mæshævæth]] || [[word:mæshævæj|mæshævæj]] || [[word:mæshævæsh|mæshævæsh]] || [[word:mæshævæ|mæshævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashashavath|mashashavath]] || [[word:mashashavaj|mashashavaj]] || [[word:mashashavash|mashashavash]] || [[word:mashashava|mashashava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashavath|mashavath]] || [[word:mashavaj|mashavaj]] || [[word:mashavash|mashavash]] || [[word:mashava|mashava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashafvath|mashafvath]] || [[word:mashafvaj|mashafvaj]] || [[word:mashafvash|mashafvash]] || [[word:mashafvaf|mashafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mashavatha|mashavatha]] || [[word:mashavaja|mashavaja]] || [[word:mashavasha|mashavasha]] || [[word:mashavaka|mashavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mashavath|mashavath]] || [[word:mashavaj|mashavaj]] || [[word:mashavash|mashavash]] || [[word:mashava|mashava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mashavathal|mashavathal]] || [[word:mashavajal|mashavajal]] || [[word:mashavashal|mashavashal]] || [[word:mashavakal|mashavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mashavathatha|mashavathatha]] || [[word:mashavajaja|mashavajaja]] || [[word:mashavashasha|mashavashasha]] || [[word:mashavaka|mashavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mashavathan|mashavathan]] || [[word:mashavajan|mashavajan]] || [[word:mashavashan|mashavashan]] || [[word:mashavakan|mashavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mashavathaoro|mashavathaoro]] || [[word:mashavajaoro|mashavajaoro]] || [[word:mashavashaoro|mashavashaoro]] || [[word:mashavakaoro|mashavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
